caption: A computer screen displays a dark-themed terminal window running a command-line interface. The screen is filled with lines of system logs and command outputs, featuring a mix of white, green, and red text on a black background. Legible text includes commands and paths such as "msg*tail routiner starknet pather/logs/app.log" and "logs/vaf/facing". The top of the window shows a menu bar with the word "Activities" and "Terminal", and a date stamp reading "Oct 28 00:21". As time progresses, the text in the terminal scrolls upward, indicating an active process generating new log entries in real-time. A cursor is visible, and some lines of text are highlighted in green, while others remain white. The overall interface suggests a developer or system administrator monitoring the backend logs of an application called "starknet".
